summary: Complete testing of PR-5A Mobile BFF Backend API layer. All 5 internal pytest tests and 24 external preview API tests passed. Mobile endpoints correctly implement auth requirements, stable DTO shapes, no MongoDB _id leaks, tenant isolation, and proper booking creation flow.

frontend_issues.note: Frontend/mobile app testing skipped - PR-5A scope is backend-only per user request

passed_tests: ✅ Internal pytest: test_mobile_bff_requires_auth - All mobile endpoints return 401 without token
✅ Internal pytest: test_mobile_auth_me_returns_sanitized_user - Mobile /auth/me returns sanitized DTO
✅ Internal pytest: test_mobile_bookings_are_tenant_isolated - Tenant A cannot see Tenant B bookings
✅ Internal pytest: test_mobile_booking_create_sets_tenant_and_returns_mobile_dto - POST creates draft with tenant scoping
✅ Internal pytest: test_mobile_dashboard_and_reports_summary_contracts - Dashboard/reports return stable shapes
✅ Preview API: GET /api/v1/mobile/auth/me requires auth (401)
✅ Preview API: GET /api/v1/mobile/dashboard/summary requires auth (401)
✅ Preview API: GET /api/v1/mobile/bookings requires auth (401)
✅ Preview API: GET /api/v1/mobile/reports/summary requires auth (401)
✅ Preview API: mobile_auth_me_fields - All required fields present (id, email, roles, organization_id, tenant_id, allowed_tenant_ids)
✅ Preview API: mobile_auth_me_no_id_leak - No raw MongoDB _id in response
✅ Preview API: mobile_auth_me_sensitive - No sensitive fields leaked (password_hash, totp_secret)
✅ Preview API: mobile_dashboard_fields - All required fields present (bookings_today, bookings_month, revenue_month, currency)
✅ Preview API: mobile_dashboard_types - Booking counts are integers
✅ Preview API: mobile_dashboard_no_id_leak - No raw MongoDB _id in response
✅ Preview API: mobile_bookings_list_fields - Has total and items fields
✅ Preview API: mobile_bookings_list_no_id_leak - No raw MongoDB _id in items
✅ Preview API: mobile_bookings_item_shape - Item has required fields (id, status, total_price, currency)
✅ Preview API: mobile_booking_create_fields - All required fields in response
✅ Preview API: mobile_booking_create_status - Status is 'draft' as expected
✅ Preview API: mobile_booking_create_no_id_leak - No raw MongoDB _id in response
✅ Preview API: mobile_booking_detail - GET detail works correctly
✅ Preview API: mobile_booking_detail_fields - Detail has tenant_id and booking_ref
✅ Preview API: mobile_booking_detail_no_id_leak - No raw MongoDB _id
✅ Preview API: mobile_reports_summary_fields - All required fields present (total_bookings, total_revenue, currency, status_breakdown, daily_sales)
✅ Preview API: mobile_reports_summary_types - status_breakdown and daily_sales are lists
✅ Preview API: mobile_reports_summary_no_id_leak - No raw MongoDB _id in response
✅ Preview API: legacy_auth_login - POST /api/auth/login works (non-regression)
✅ Preview API: legacy_auth_me - GET /api/auth/me works (non-regression)
critical_code_review_comments: Mobile router correctly mounted at /api/v1/mobile prefix in server.py (line 670)
Mobile schemas (MobileAuthMeResponse, MobileBookingSummary, etc.) properly separate from web DTOs
Mobile service correctly uses _booking_summary() and _booking_detail() to convert MongoDB docs without _id leak
Tenant isolation properly enforced via _current_tenant_id() and _tenant_filter() in mobile service
Booking creation correctly delegates to existing create_booking_draft() domain service
Mobile BFF is a thin projection/orchestration layer as designed - no business logic ownership

success_rate.frontend: N/A - backend-only testing per PR-5A scope

seed_data_creation: Test bookings created via POST /api/v1/mobile/bookings during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: PR-5A Mobile BFF Backend fully tested. Key endpoints: /api/v1/mobile/auth/me, /dashboard/summary, /bookings, /bookings/{id}, /reports/summary. All require bearer auth. No MongoDB _id leaks. Mobile DTOs separate from web DTOs. Tenant isolation enforced. Legacy auth endpoints unaffected.

api_verification.GET /api/v1/mobile/auth/me: ✅ 200 - Returns sanitized mobile user DTO without _id leak
api_verification.GET /api/v1/mobile/dashboard/summary: ✅ 200 - Returns KPI summary (bookings_today, bookings_month, revenue_month, currency)
api_verification.GET /api/v1/mobile/bookings: ✅ 200 - Returns paginated booking list without _id leak
api_verification.GET /api/v1/mobile/bookings/{id}: ✅ 200 - Returns booking detail with tenant isolation
api_verification.POST /api/v1/mobile/bookings: ✅ 201 - Creates draft booking with tenant scoping

contract_compliance.auth_requirement: All mobile endpoints return 401 without bearer token
contract_compliance.no_id_leak: MongoDB _id never exposed in any mobile response
contract_compliance.dto_separation: Mobile DTOs (MobileAuthMeResponse, MobileBookingSummary, etc.) separate from web DTOs
contract_compliance.tenant_isolation: Bookings properly scoped by tenant via X-Tenant-Id header
contract_compliance.domain_reuse: Booking creation delegates to existing booking_service.create_booking_draft()
